_comment: Cross-broker dataset registry for robustness validation. Copy to datasets.json, drop your raw files under data/external/<broker>/, fix the paths/columns, then run ingest_dataset.py + cross_validate.py. 'symbol' MUST be 'btc' or 'xau' (picks broker specs + synthetic-spread defaults). 'window' is optional [start,end) UTC. See ingest_dataset.py header for every supported 'format' and its required fields.

datasets.name: exness_btcusd_2024
datasets._note: Standard Exness/MT5 tab-separated tick export. Same shape as our primary data/btcusd feed.

datasets.name: oanda_xauusd_2024
datasets._note: OANDA candle/tick CSVs usually carry explicit bid+ask. If time is RFC3339, the ts_format above parses it; if it is epoch ms set ts_unit:ms instead of ts_format.

datasets.name: binance_btcusdt_aggtrades_2024
datasets._note: Binance has no quoted spread (it is an exchange tape). half_spread is in price units; or use half_spread_bps for a relative spread. Binance has no XAU.

datasets.name: binance_btcusdt_klines_2024
datasets._note: 1-minute klines (already OHLC). Ingest synthesises a 4-tick O->L->H->C tape per bar for fill timing. Coarser than real ticks — treat as a sanity cross-check, not a primary backtest.
